title: Untitled
prompt_text: A surreal close-up against a plain white background. A tiny, sentient green pickle with a human-like face, limbs, and water droplets on its skin is held between two fingers. A person feeds the pickle creature a fresh cucumber slice, which it eats with human-like teeth. The lighting is bright and sterile.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A surreal close-up against a plain white background. A tiny, sentient green pickle with a human-like face, limbs, and water droplets on its skin is held between two fingers. A person feeds the pickle creature a fresh cucumber slice, which it eats with human-like teeth. The lighting is bright and sterile.

cinematography.cameraShot: Macro close-up, static shot centered on the pickle creature.

actions: A hand brings a cucumber slice to the pickle's mouth.
The pickle creature bites into the cucumber slice and chews vigorously.
The pickle looks surprised, opening its eyes wide after swallowing.
The pickle finishes by smiling contentedly at the camera.
